zh.Pavilly, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie: 法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利帕維利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY於大約1258年出生時，她的父親Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello29歲，母親Isabeau De Mello20歲。她於1272年與Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰雷福福爾雷福盧
zh-hans.Pavilly, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie: 法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利帕維利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY于大约1258年出生时，她的父亲Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello29岁，母亲Isabeau De Mello20岁。她于1272年与Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Origin uncertain: possibly connected with Old Irish ítu ‘thirst’. It was borne by a 6th-century saint who founded a convent in Limerick.

en.lifeSummary: When Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY was born about 1258, her father, Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello, was 29 and her mother, Isabeau De Mello, was 20. She married Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL in 1272, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY est née environ 1258, son père, Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabeau De Mello, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL en 1272, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY um 1258 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello 29 und ihre Mutter Isabeau De Mello 20. Sie hat 1272 in Normandie, Frankreich Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY è nata il circa 1258, sua padre, Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Isabeau De Mello, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL nel 1272, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNYが約1258年に生まれた時，父Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Melloは29歳，母Isabeau De Melloは20歳であった。1272年にフランスノーマンディでGuillaume II d'ESNEVALと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY(이)가 대략 1258년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabeau De Mello(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1272년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland: Renfrew, Siorrachd Rinn Friù, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY nasceu aproximadamente 1258, seu pai, Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau De Mello, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL em 1272, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY родилась около 1258 г., её отцу по имени Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabeau De Mello, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL в 1272 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ide de Mauvoisin de ROSNY nació aproximadamente 1258, su papá, Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Isabeau De Mello, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Guillaume II d'ESNEVAL en 1272, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
